headline: Switzerland's good offices: Bürgenstock hosts the US-Iran talks
summary: FDFA made the Bürgenstock available for resumed US-Iran talks that opened Sunday in Nidwalden.

headline: Skyguide technical outage grounds Zürich departures, closes eastern Swiss airspace
summary: A Skyguide failure closed airspace east of Bern Sunday morning, halting Zurich departures; cause disputed.

headline: SVP neutrality initiative trailing 54% no in pre-recess poll ahead of 27 September vote
summary: A pre-summer poll shows the UDC/SVP neutrality initiative losing 54-46; federal vote set for 27 September 2026.

headline: Kremlin transnational repression reaches exiled Russians in Switzerland
summary: SRF investigation into Moscow using legal instruments to pursue critics abroad, including in Switzerland.

headline: US and Iran open talks at the Bürgenstock under Qatari and Pakistani mediation, then Iran suspends
summary: Iran-US negotiations opened Sunday with Lebanon as main agenda and a reported 60-day roadmap; Iranian delegation reportedly suspended talks; no signed framework.

headline: Colombia presidential runoff pits governing left against right-wing hardliner
summary: Polls opened for Colombia's presidential runoff, decider from the 31 May first round.

headline: Ukraine drone strikes hit Crimea and Krasnodar oil facilities
summary: Ukrainian drones struck occupied Crimea (4 dead per Russian sources) and oil facilities in Krasnodar.

headline: Ten years after Brexit, rejoiners march in London
summary: Thousands of pro-EU demonstrators marched in London on 2026-06-20, 10 years after the 2016 leave vote.

headline: Severe heatwave across central and western France forces alcohol bans and school closures
summary: A canicule prompted local alcohol-sale bans and school closures in France; same heat dome straining Switzerland.

headline: picklescan misses fresh malicious-pickle gadgets enabling RCE
summary: CVE-2025-71348/71351/71357/71378: picklescan fails to detect torch load_config, timeit, idlelib, cProfile gadgets in pickle reduce methods.

headline: Crawl4AI hardcoded default JWT key allows full auth bypass
summary: CVE-2026-56265 (9.3): Crawl4AI before 0.8.7 ships a hardcoded JWT signing key in its Docker API server.

headline: Prefect GitRepository storage class allows RCE via git-flag injection
summary: CVE-2026-5366 (9.9): Prefect 3.6.23 unvalidated commit_sha/directories enable git argument injection and code execution.

headline: vLLM unvalidated multimodal embeddings enable DoS and memory corruption
summary: CVE-2026-56340 (8.7): vLLM 0.10.2-0.13.0 lacks sparse tensor validation in prompt-embeds; continues CVE-2025-62164.

headline: libexpat integer-overflow cluster fixed in 2.8.2
summary: CVE-2026-56403..56410: eight integer overflows in the widely embedded libexpat XML parser, fixed in 2.8.2.

headline: Signed Windows kernel-driver flaws in consumer disk tools enable privilege escalation
summary: CVE-2026-12778..12786: AOMEI, EaseUS, IM-Magic, UltraISO kernel drivers (7.1 each) allow local escalation / BYOVD abuse.
